title: Resolver Audit Finding
description: Single finding emitted by resolver_audit.py in --json mode.

severity.description: Severity. Errors fail --fail-on-findings; warnings do not.

skill_name.description: Name of the affected skill (matches the directory name under skills/).

path.description: Repo-relative path to the file that triggered the finding.

line.description: Line number within `path`, when applicable (e.g. missing_script reference).

message.description: Human-readable finding description, including remediation hint where possible.

related_skills.description: Other skill names involved in the finding (e.g. trigger_overlap collisions).

trigger.description: Trigger phrase involved, when type is trigger_overlap.
